steps.title: Use the location note
steps.content: The student wants to indicate the location of the Isthmus of Ierapetra. The relevant notes say it is located in the Mediterranean Sea and connects the Siteia municipality to the rest of Crete.

steps.title: Avoid just defining isthmus
steps.content: Choice A and Choice B explain what an isthmus is, but they do not give the location of this specific isthmus. Choice C only identifies it as an example. The effective response states its Mediterranean location and adds what it connects. The answer is D.
